use_cases: Used as a standalone checkbox input for boolean selections in forms
Embedded in list items for multi-select functionality in task or item management interfaces
Used for accepting terms, conditions, or agreement checkboxes in onboarding flows
Integrated into filter interfaces for toggling visibility of data categories
Utilized in settings panels for enabling or disabling feature toggles
ai_summary: A lightweight checkbox component built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling. Provides accessible checkbox functionality with focus states, disabled states, and checked state indicator via a check icon. Designed as a reusable atomic component for composing larger form and list interfaces.
